# PPD Destroy Dates

```sql
select * 
from tblNonconformances
where 
	DispositionDestroy = 1
	and DestroyedDate is null
--	and MRBRemoveDate is null
--	and	TagCloseDate is NULL

update tblNonconformances
set destroyeddate = MRBRemoveDate,
	DispositionDestroy = 1
where 
	TagCloseDate < '9/1/2017'
	and DispositionDestroy = 1
	and DestroyedDate is null
	and MRBRemoveDate < '9/1/2017'
	and NonconformanceDISPO1 = 'MRB Entry'
--(6 row(s) affected)

update tblNonconformances
set DispositionDestroy = 0
where 
	TagCloseDate < '9/1/2017'
	and DispositionDestroy = 1
	and DestroyedDate is null
	and NonconformanceDISPO1 <> 'MRB Entry'
--(57 row(s) affected)
```
